summary: Tested Arabic RTL POS features: Expenses page with cashier breakdown, POS payment buttons with orange selection, and receipt is_paid status. All core features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Expenses API correctly includes created_by_name for each expense (line 2822 in server.py)
Expenses API populates created_by_name for old expenses from users collection (lines 2849-2857)
Expenses.js correctly displays 3 sections: حسب التصنيف, مصاريف الكاشيرية, سجل المصاريف
Expense log shows cashier name and time for each expense (lines 617-619 in Expenses.js)
POS payment buttons use bg-orange-500 class when selected (line 3358 in POS.js)
handleSaveAndSendToKitchen validates payment method before kitchen send (lines 1417-1420)
Receipt bitmap includes is_paid status with مدفوعة/غير مدفوعة text (lines 388-397 in receiptBitmap.js)
printService passes is_paid to receipt data (line 317 in printService.js)
seed_data_creation: Created test expense via API for verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working: 1) Expenses API returns created_by_name, 2) Expenses page shows 3 sections with cashier breakdown, 3) POS payment buttons turn orange when selected, 4) Receipt bitmap includes is_paid status. Current open shift is for 'كاشير تجريبي'.
verified_features: GET /api/expenses returns created_by_name for each expense
Expenses page loads with 3 sections: حسب التصنيف, مصاريف الكاشيرية, سجل المصاريف
Expense log shows cashier name (هاني الدجيلي) and time for each expense
POS page loads correctly with payment buttons
Payment buttons (نقدي, بطاقة, آجل) turn orange (bg-orange-500) when selected
Owner shift badge visible showing 'وردية مفتوحة' and 'كاشير تجريبي'
Receipt bitmap code includes is_paid status (مدفوعة/غير مدفوعة) at lines 388-397
printService passes is_paid to receipt data at line 317
